items.name: Silver G Small Punk Shoulder Bag
items.description:
The G Punk Chain Small Shoulder Bag is crafted in a streamlined silhouette from smooth premium leather accented by shiny silver hardware. It has a classic-chic look made bolder by spike embellishment, a chain shoulder strap and a large turn-lock closure.

Made in partnership with Builder_Boy
